ddt:Target.Name: APB_X95_X080_4
ddt:Target.Description:
Assisted Parking Brake // To be used from Slot phase //
Updated XML according Spec 1.5.4
Anaud LOSQ Tel: 53044 Sce: 65630 E-mail: arnaud.losq@renault.com
A UTILISER AVEC LE SW X080 UNIQUEMENT.
- DataRecorder_CurrentActLeft & DataRecorder_CurrentActRight are now 0.001 resolution instead of 0.01

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Producteur MUX Boitier auto école compteur
Producteur MUX Contrôle électrique couple compteur
Producteur MUX Systeme anti roulis compteur
Producteur MUX Tabbeau de bord compteur

Item.Text: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
All faults reports and alerts are enabled
no engine stop requested by driver
nominal engine stop requested by driver
Not Available (Init or Lever Switched failure)
Checksum of the configuration data not correct

Data.Name: VehicleForwardSlope
Data.Comment: Raw signal coming from Tilt Sensor: TiltSensor variable is in TOA algorithm. Unit: %g.

Item.Text: Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released

Data.Name: ClutchPedalPosition
Data.Comment: clutchPedal signal coming from Clutch Sensor: ClutchSensor variable is in TOA algorithm Unit: 0-100%

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: No brake pedal request message display
Brake pedal request message to display
Brake pedal request message re-emission request
Tightened request unavailable warning re-emission request
No warning 'Vehicle not immobilized' display request
No APB not tightened warning display requested
Parking brake not tightened warning display requested
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Checksum of the configuration data not correct
Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released
Wind Back - Released to fully released

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ProgrammingSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: Producteur MUX Boitier auto école compteur
Producteur MUX Contrôle électrique couple compteur
Producteur MUX Systeme anti roulis compteur
Producteur MUX Tabbeau de bord compteur

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: Ce défaut inhibe les fonctions automatiques du FPA - FPA manuel

Ce défaut inhibe les fonctions automatiques du FPA - FPA manuel

Label.Text: To be used to change pads only
